Question:
SELECT
    ...
    CASE
        WHEN lower(cvr."STMT_TYPE") = 'PE' THEN 'Pre-Election'
        ...
        ELSE 'Unknown'
    END AS statement_type
    cvr."FROM_DATE" AS from_date,
    cvr."THRU_DATE" AS thru_date,
    ...
What was the problem?: missing comma after END AS statement_type
How would you fix it?: so it gets merged with the next column
Answer: add the missing comma after statement_type
